'''Paul Broadbent''' (born 24 May 1968), also known by the [[nickname]] '''"[[Vicia faba|Beans]]"''', is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s, and has [[coach (sport)|coach]]ed in the 2000s, 2010s and 2020s.<ref name="Coach Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/> He played at representative level for [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]] and [[England national rugby league team|England]], and at club level for [[Sheffield Eagles]], [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]], [[Hull FC]], [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] ([[Captain (sports)|captain]]), and [[York City Knights]], as a {{rlp|pr}}, and coached at club level for [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] (First Team Coach).<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Biography==
Broadbent's [[Testimonial match]] at Sheffield Eagles took place in 1997.

In the 1997 post season, Broadbent was selected to play for [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]] at prop forward in all three matches of the [[Super League Test series]] against [[Australia national rugby league team|Australia]].

Broadbent played at {{rlp|pr}} in Sheffield Eagles' 17-8 victory over [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[1998 Challenge Cup]] Final during [[Super League III]] at [[Wembley Stadium (1923)|Wembley Stadium]], [[London]] on Saturday 2 May 1998.

Broadbent won [[Cap (sport)|cap]]s for England while at Sheffield Eagles in 1995 against France, in the [[1995 Rugby League World Cup]] against Fiji, and South Africa (sub), in 1996 against France, and Wales. He also won [[Cap (sport)|cap]]s for Great Britain while at Sheffield Eagles in 1996 against Papua New Guinea, Fiji, and New Zealand (3 matches).

He has previously coached [[Italy national rugby league team|Italy]] in their European Championship B matches 2012-15.<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://www.rlef.eu.com/italy/introduction |title=RLEF |access-date=3 October 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20141010144955/http://www.rlef.eu.com/italy/introduction |archive-date=10 October 2014 |url-status=dead }}</ref> [[Cameron Ciraldo]] will take over for the World Cup Qualifying matches.

Paul Broadbent is the father of the rugby league footballer for the [[Sheffield Eagles]]; [[Blake Broadbent]].<ref name="Blake Broadbent Statistics at loverugbyleague.com">{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/blake-broadbent|title=Blake Broadbent Statistics at loverugbyleague.com|publisher=loverugbyleague.com|date=31 December 2019|accessdate=1 January 2020}}</ref><ref name="Blake Broadbent Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org">{{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/blake-broadbent/summary.html|title=Blake Broadbent Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2019|accessdate=1 January 2020}}</ref>
